integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_evolution_smoke():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/_run_real_evolution_500.py', '--gens=1', '--agents=10'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300
    )
    assert result.returncode == 0, f'进化失败: {result.stderr[-500:]}'
    print('✓ 1 代冒烟进化通过')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 risk_parity
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*risk_parity import|import risk_parity', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)

import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

unit_tests.name: test_risk_parity_signal_feeder_coverage
unit_tests.description: 验证 risk_parity_signal 的 feeder 覆盖率 ≥ 80%
unit_tests.test_code:
def test_feeder_coverage():
    from hermes_v6.sandbox_trading.strategy_registry import _TWO_PHASE_FEEDERS
    feeders = _TWO_PHASE_FEEDERS.get('risk_parity_signal', {})
    coverage = len(feeders) / 10.0  # 假设满分 10 个通道
    assert coverage >= 0.8, f'feeder 覆盖率 {coverage:.0%} < 80%'
    print(f'✓ feeder 覆盖率 {coverage:.0%}')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports

integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*cppi_portfolio_insurance import|import cppi_portfolio_insurance', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

def test_no_dangling_imports():

        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*liquidity_adjusted_strategy import|import liquidity_adjusted_strategy', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):

        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'

regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 stat_arb_pairs
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*stat_arb_pairs import|import stat_arb_pairs', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*cross_chain_arbitrage import|import cross_chain_arbitrage', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*momentum import|import momentum', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_evolution_smoke():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/_run_real_evolution_500.py', '--gens=1', '--agents=10'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300
    )
    assert result.returncode == 0, f'进化失败: {result.stderr[-500:]}'
    print('✓ 1 代冒烟进化通过')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 perp_market_making
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*perp_market_making import|import perp_market_making', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

    print(f'✓ feeder 覆盖率 {coverage:.0%}')

    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import subprocess
def test_evolution_smoke():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/_run_real_evolution_500.py', '--gens=1', '--agents=10'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300
    )
    assert result.returncode == 0, f'进化失败: {result.stderr[-500:]}'
    print('✓ 1 代冒烟进化通过')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 stat_arbitrage
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*stat_arbitrage import|import stat_arbitrage', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

def test_feeder_coverage():

    feeders = _TWO_PHASE_FEEDERS.get('vanna_volga_arbitrage', {})

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*risk_parity_signal import|import risk_parity_signal', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True

    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 macro_liquidity_cycle
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*macro_liquidity_cycle import|import macro_liquidity_cycle', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*adversarial_rl_trading import|import adversarial_rl_trading', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用

    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression

import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*rl_market_making import|import rl_market_making', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

def test_evolution_smoke():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/_run_real_evolution_500.py', '--gens=1', '--agents=10'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300

    print('✓ 1 代冒烟进化通过')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 microstructure_alpha_trading
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*microstructure_alpha_trading import|import microstructure_alpha_trading', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*order_flow_cvd import|import order_flow_cvd', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],

    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*transformer_decision_policy import|import transformer_decision_policy', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*smart_money_footprint import|import smart_money_footprint', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用

    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 basis_arbitrage
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*basis_arbitrage import|import basis_arbitrage', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import subprocess
def test_evolution_smoke():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/_run_real_evolution_500.py', '--gens=1', '--agents=10'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300
    )
    assert result.returncode == 0, f'进化失败: {result.stderr[-500:]}'
    print('✓ 1 代冒烟进化通过')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 cex_dex_flash_arbitrage
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*cex_dex_flash_arbitrage import|import cex_dex_flash_arbitrage', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:

    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*grid_strike import|import grid_strike', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True

    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)

import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 narrative_driven
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*narrative_driven import|import narrative_driven', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 scalping
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*scalping import|import scalping', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*value_investing import|import value_investing', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True

    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

steps.expected_outcome: feeder 覆盖率从当前值提升到 ≥ 80%

steps.expected_outcome: 信号触发率提升, 但不产生噪声信号

steps.description: 在进化配置中增加 stat_arbitrage 的种群配额或 evolution 权重
commands: # 编辑 evolution_loop.py, 提升 'stat_arbitrage' 的初始种群占比
steps.expected_outcome: 下一轮进化中该模块 agent 数量提升

steps.description: 运行 1 轮进化后重新评估影响权重和性能指标

import subprocess
def test_evolution_smoke():
    result = subprocess.run(

        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 risk_parity
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*risk_parity import|import risk_parity', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)

import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*seasonality_cycle import|import seasonality_cycle', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*liquidity_adjusted_strategy import|import liquidity_adjusted_strategy', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')

import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*volatility_arbitrage import|import volatility_arbitrage', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True

    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):

    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')

        stats = json.loads(last_line)

    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'

integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 diffusion_forecast_v1_1
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*diffusion_forecast_v1_1 import|import diffusion_forecast_v1_1', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression

import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

integration_tests.name: test_evolution_smoke_1gen
integration_tests.description: 1 代冒烟进化测试, 验证系统端到端可工作
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_evolution_smoke():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['python3', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/_run_real_evolution_500.py', '--gens=1', '--agents=10'],
        capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=300
    )
    assert result.returncode == 0, f'进化失败: {result.stderr[-500:]}'
    print('✓ 1 代冒烟进化通过')

integration_tests.name: test_no_dangling_imports
integration_tests.description: 验证无其他模块仍尝试 import 已删除/合并的 liquidation_hunter
integration_tests.test_code:
import subprocess
def test_no_dangling_imports():
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['grep', '-rn', f'from.*liquidation_hunter import|import liquidation_hunter', 'hermes_v6/sandbox_trading/'],
        capture_output=True, text=True
    )
    # 允许 .bak 文件和 __pycache__ 中的引用
    live_refs = [l for l in result.stdout.splitlines() if '.bak' not in l and '__pycache__' not in l]
    assert not live_refs, f'存在悬空引用: {live_refs}'
    print('✓ 无悬空 import 引用')

regression_tests.name: test_fitness_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后平均 fitness 不显著下降 (阈值 10%)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点

unit_tests.name: test_marl_portfolio_management_feeder_coverage
unit_tests.description: 验证 marl_portfolio_management 的 feeder 覆盖率 ≥ 80%
unit_tests.test_code:
def test_feeder_coverage():
    from hermes_v6.sandbox_trading.strategy_registry import _TWO_PHASE_FEEDERS
    feeders = _TWO_PHASE_FEEDERS.get('marl_portfolio_management', {})
    coverage = len(feeders) / 10.0  # 假设满分 10 个通道
    assert coverage >= 0.8, f'feeder 覆盖率 {coverage:.0%} < 80%'
    print(f'✓ feeder 覆盖率 {coverage:.0%}')

import json, os
def test_fitness_no_regression(baseline_fitness=None):
    # 读取最新一代 fitness
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_fitness = stats.get('avg_fitness', 0.0)
    if baseline_fitness is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前 fitness: {current_fitness}')
        return
    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

    drop = (baseline_fitness - current_fitness) / abs(baseline_fitness) if baseline_fitness else 0
    assert drop < 0.10, f'fitness 下降 {drop:.1%} > 10%, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ fitness 无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')

regression_tests.name: test_winrate_no_regression
regression_tests.description: 验证重构后整体胜率不显著下降 (阈值 5 个百分点)
regression_tests.test_code:
import json, os
def test_winrate_no_regression(baseline_winrate=None):
    data_dir = 'hermes_v6/data/sandbox_trading_intraday_500_v316'
    stats_path = os.path.join(data_dir, 'evolution_stats.jsonl')
    with open(stats_path) as f:
        last_line = [l for l in f if l.strip()][-1]
        stats = json.loads(last_line)
    current_wr = stats.get('avg_winrate', 0.0)
    if baseline_winrate is None:
        print(f'⚠ 无基线, 当前胜率: {current_wr}')
        return
    drop = baseline_winrate - current_wr
    assert drop < 0.05, f'胜率下降 {drop:.1%} > 5pp, 触发回滚'
    print(f'✓ 胜率无显著下降 (下降 {drop:.1%})')
regression_tests.expected_result: 胜率下降 < 5 个百分点
